slides.title: Meet Dart! 🎯
slides.content:
Dart is a modern, fast programming language created by Google.

It's the secret sauce behind **Flutter**, letting you build apps for iOS, Android, and Web with one codebase!

quizData.question: Who created the Dart programming language?

slides.title: Why Dart? ⚡
slides.content:
Dart is designed for **UI (User Interfaces)**.

It has a feature called 'hot reload', letting you see your app changes instantly. No more waiting!

slides.title: Developer Secret 🤫
slides.content: If you master Dart, you immediately unlock the power to build real mobile apps via Flutter.
